rules:
Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for up to 3 Colorless Pokémon and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-EX) and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Sky Return
attacks.effect: Return this Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Emerald Break
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Intensifying Burn
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Sonic Ace
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Fast Raid
attacks.effect: If you go first, you can use this attack on your first turn.

attacks.name: Light Pulse
attacks.effect: Prevent all effects of your opponent's attacks, except damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Unwavering Blade
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Swift Lunge
attacks.effect: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Piercing Prizes
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your remaining Prize cards.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Headlock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Voltage Rush
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 50 damage to itself.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

This card can only be attached to Dragon Pokémon. This card provides every type of Energy, but provides only 2 Energy at a time, only while this card is attached to a Dragon Pokémon.

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Dragon Pokémon, discard this card.)

Search your deck for up to 3 Colorless Pokémon and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Damage from the attacks of the Pokémon this card is attached to is affected by Weakness and Resistance for your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-EX) and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Discard 2 cards from your hand. (If you can't discard 2 cards, you can't play this card.) Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Trainer card you find there (except Trainers' Mail) and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Trainer card you find there (except Trainers' Mail) and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a Supporter card and a basic Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Each player can have 8 Pokémon on his or her Bench.

(When this card leaves play, each player discards Benched Pokémon until he or she has 5 Pokémon on the Bench. The owner of this card discards first.)

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Put a Basic Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Rayquaza-EX.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Mega Evolution Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Latios-EX.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Whenever you attach an Energy card from your hand to the Pokémon this card is attached to, heal 20 damage from it.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Gallade-EX.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Acrobatics
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Despite the beauty of its lilting voice, it's merciless to intruders that enter its territory.

attacks.name: Feather Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, each of this Pokémon's attacks does 80 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Sky Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Strong Winds
attacks.effect: Shuffle all cards attached to each player's Pokémon into that player's deck.

flavorText: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves fell close to anyone other than their Trainers.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.

attacks.name: Homing Pidove
attacks.effect: Look at the top card of your deck. Then, you may shuffle your deck.

flavorText: These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.

attacks.name: Sky Return
attacks.effect: Return this Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

flavorText: On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.

attacks.name: Bind Wound
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It constantly grooms its cotton-like wings. It takes a shower to clean itself if it becomes dirty.
It dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. It catches its prey with sharp claws.

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Aerial Ace
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. It catches its prey with sharp claws.

attacks.name: Double Peck
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It dislikes cold seasons. They migrate to other lands in search of warmth, flying over 180 miles a day.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Despite being clad entirely in iron-hard armor, it flies at speed of over 180 mph.

attacks.name: Burrow
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.

attacks.name: Feelin' Fine
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

attacks.name: Drill Run
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It has the stamina to fly all day on its broad wings. It fights by using its sharp beak.
Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

attacks.name: Energy Stream
attacks.effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.

attacks.name: Bright Wing
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: When Reshiram's tail flares, the heat energy moves the atmosphere and changes the world's weather.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon can't use Dragon Strike during your next turn.

attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: If you go first, you can use this attack on your first turn.

attacks.name: Shatter
attacks.effect: Discard any Stadium card in play.

attacks.name: Power Howl
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Steam Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It's uncontrollable if enraged. It flies around spouting flames and scorching fields and mountains.
Its armored body makes all attacks bounce off. The armor is too tough, however, making it heavy and somewhat sluggish.

attacks.name: Leer
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Almost Flight
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.

attacks.name: Continuous Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.

attacks.name: Song of Echoes
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Midnight Eyes
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.

attacks.name: Wrapped in Wind
attacks.effect: Attach up to 2 basic Energy cards from your hand to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.

attacks.name: Mach Press
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.

attacks.name: Shed Skin
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. It is said to have the ability to change the weather.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: This Pokémon is full of life energy. It continually sheds its skin and grows steadily larger.

attacks.name: Look for Keys
attacks.effect: Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal an Item card. Put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.

attacks.name: Spin Tackle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Born from temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.
It shares many blessings with people who respect one another's rights and avoid needless strife.

attacks.name: Powerful Slap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Aura Sphere
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It shares many blessings with people who respect one another's rights and avoid needless strife.

attacks.name: Go Fetch
attacks.effect: Shuffle 3 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

flavorText: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.

attacks.name: Sweet Kiss
attacks.effect: Your opponent draws a card.

flavorText: A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping Togepi stand up.

attacks.name: Diminutive Desire
attacks.effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Doom Desire
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon. The Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out at the end of your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It is said to have the ability to grant any wish for just one week every thousand years.

attacks.name: Rip Off
attacks.effect: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent's will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.

attacks.name: Mach Claw
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: It appears when it senses an impending natural disaster. As a result, it was mistaken as a doom bringer.

attacks.name: Midair Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

flavorText: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.

attacks.name: Rock Slide
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Its flight is soundless. It uses its lengthy tail to carry off its prey… Then its elongated fangs do the rest.

attacks.name: Stun Poison
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned.

flavorText: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the startled victim to inject poison.

attacks.name: Unwavering Blade
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

attacks.effect: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Piercing Prizes
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your remaining Prize cards.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Close Encounter
attacks.effect: If you go first, you can use this attack on your first turn. Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does 60 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: DNA from a space virus mutated and became a Pokémon. It appears where auroras are seen.

attacks.name: Evolution Jammer
attacks.effect: Your opponent can't play any Pokémon from his or her hand to evolve his or her Pokémon during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Curse Deeply
attacks.effect: Put 5 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Strong feelings of hatred turned a puppet into a Pokémon. If it opens its mouth, its cursed energy escapes.
Strong feelings of hatred turned a puppet into a Pokémon. If it opens its mouth, its cursed energy escapes.

attacks.name: Bleh
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavorText: It loves vengeful emotions and hangs in rows under the eaves of houses where vengeful people live.

attacks.name: Future Sight
attacks.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of either player's deck and put them back on top of that player's deck in any order.

attacks.name: Stressful Eye
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Discard a Trainer card you find there.

flavorText: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

attacks.name: Psywave
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the amount of Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.
It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.

attacks.name: Headlock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Voltage Rush
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 50 damage to itself.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: A legendary Pokémon that is said to live in thunderclouds. It freely controls lightning bolts.

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Energy Bomb
attacks.effect: You may move all Energy from this Pokémon to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: It stores an overflowing amount of electric energy inside its body. Even a small shock makes it explode.

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Big Explosion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 60 damage to itself.

flavorText: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poké Ball, it has zapped many people.

attacks.name: Tail Whip
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.

attacks.name: Swallow
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It is a messenger of the skies, carrying small Pokémon and eggs to safety in its bill.
It makes its nest on steep sea cliffs. Riding updrafts, it soars to great heights.

attacks.name: Chilling Sigh
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Tri Edge
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

attacks.name: Find Ice
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Water Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

attacks.name: Grand Loop
attacks.effect: Draw 3 cards. You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Brave Bird
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: When attacking prey, it can reach speeds of up to 310 mph. It finishes its prey off with a colossal kick.

attacks.name: Peck Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tool cards attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: The hotter the flame sac on its belly, the faster it can fly, but it takes some time to get the fire going.

attacks.name: Me First
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being's entire body will be overflowing with power.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: The bunch of fruit around its neck ripens twice a year and is delicious. It's a highly favored tropical snack.

attacks.name: Cursed Rain
attacks.effect: Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hopeless Scream
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

flavorText: A most peculiar Pokémon that somehow appears in a Poké Ball when a Nincada evolves.

attacks.name: Afterimage Assault
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Ninjask and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Because it moves so quickly, it sometimes becomes unseeable. It congregates around tree sap.

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It can sometimes live underground for more than 10 years. It absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees.

attacks.name: Wind Shard
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It violently flutters its wings to scatter toxic dust when attacked. It becomes active after sunset.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Twilight Poison
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

flavorText: It violently flutters its wings to scatter toxic dust when attacked. It becomes active after sunset.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Iron Defense
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It never forgets any attack it endured while in the cocoon. After evolution, it seeks payback.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It has an aggressive nature. It stabs prey with its long, narrow mouth to drain the prey's fluids.

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It drinks dew that collects on its silk and waits for evolution. Its hard cocoon repels attacks.

attacks.name: Flock
attacks.effect: Search your deck for Wurmple and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It lives among the tall grass and in forests. It repels attacks by raising up the spikes on its rear.

attacks.name: Shake It Off
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of Colorless Pokémon your opponent has in play.

flavorText: It is called "The Walking Jungle." If a head grows too big, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.

attacks.name: Loathe
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it was discovered to be a life-form more like plant seeds.
